Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dread War]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dread War disrupted Reigan Shen's fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dread War involved twelve Monarchs attacking the Wandering Titan to destroy the Dreadgods.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Dread War was caused by the elimination of the Dreadgods.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Dread War is a past event involving the four Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — All four Dreadgods have been awakened for the first time since the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Dread War is a historical event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Emala died during the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Dread War was the last time all four Dreadgods rampaged at the same time.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Dread War was a conflict that occurred before the Sovereign Drum was made.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The last Dread War was a time when the current chance to be rid of the Dreadgods did not exist.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Dread War destroyed much of the grasslands on the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Dread War was a war in which powerful Sages were killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Dread War is a historical event witnessed by Reigan Shen.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
